data.title: Inventor from Florida creates Conditioning Comb (HAD-639) to apply conditioner easily and mess-free.
data.description: An inventor from Lox, Florida, shared the inspiration behind the creation of the CONDITIONING COMB, aiming to streamline the process of applying conditioner to hair. The innovative tool allows for even distribution of conditioner for effortless detangling. Introduced on February 17, 2026, this new approach to hair care could revolutionize routines. Designed to reduce mess and simplify the process, the inventor's idea could potentially aid in making hair care more efficient.

data.title: Despite investments, lack of data governance in hospitality industry slowing modernization efforts, per Info-Tech Research Group.
data.description: Ongoing investments in new digital platforms are being hindered in the hospitality industry due to unclear data standards and fragmented ownership, according to recent findings from Info-Tech Research Group. The study highlights that establishing precise data requirements and implementing structured discovery processes are crucial for advancing modernization efforts. This challenge is impacting businesses across the industry, where a significant percentage are struggling to adapt to the evolving digital landscape. The research underscores the importance of addressing these obstacles to drive innovation and improve operational efficiency.

ACCORDING TO BARR, THE JOB MARKET APPEARS BROADLY BALANCED RIGHT NOW, THOUGH IT REMAINS SENSITIVE TO ECONOMIC SHOCKS OR POLICY MISSTEPS. RECENT ECONOMIC REPORTS SUGGEST EMPLOYMENT CONDITIONS ARE STABILIZING, REDUCING FEARS OF OVERHEATING BUT NOT ELIMINATING LABOR RISKS.

data.title: Crypto treasuries of Strategy and Bitmine increase with BTC now at 717,131 and ETH at 4.37 million, amid market challenges.
data.description: Recent purchases have increased Strategy's Bitcoin holdings to 717,131 BTC and Bitmine's Ethereum holdings to 4.37 million ETH. These acquisitions have bolstered corporate crypto treasuries, demonstrating confidence in the market despite its ongoing weakness.

FED'S BARR SAID ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE SHOULD BOOST PRODUCTIVITY AND LIVING STANDARDS IN THE LONG RUN, EVEN IF IT DISRUPTS CERTAIN JOB SECTORS. BARR NOTED THERE IS LITTLE EVIDENCE SO FAR THAT AI IS DRIVING UP UNEMPLOYMENT OR CAUSING WIDESPREAD JOB LOSSES.

data.title: Volatus Aerospace Inc. demonstrates strong infrastructure, financial readiness, and operational execution post-Canada's Defence Industrial Strategy.
data.description: Volatus Aerospace Inc. emphasizes its strong infrastructure, financial preparedness, and operational efficiency post Canada’s Defence Industrial Strategy. The company is well-positioned with established facilities and resources, along with financial stability to support its operations. This strategic advantage enables Volatus Aerospace Inc. to effectively execute its plans in the defense sector, showcasing its readiness for future endeavors.

data.title: Merus is investing approximately $450 million to redevelop RiverGate Mall, a retail landmark in North Nashville, Madison, and Goodlettsville since 1971.
data.description: Today in Nashville, Tennessee, Merus, a top design-build real estate development company, revealed their acquisition and upcoming renovation of RiverGate Mall. The mall, a significant retail hub in North Nashville, Madison, and Goodlettsville since 1971, will undergo major transformations under the new ownership.

data.title: Latest Ray Serve v2.54 update includes Grafana dashboard for ML debugging, offering insights on serving latency and autoscaling issues.
data.description: Anyscale has recently launched a brand new Ray Serve Grafana dashboard that allows users to conduct real-time monitoring and debugging of machine learning model serving latency, as well as issues related to autoscaling and deployment failures. This tool provides users with valuable insights and data to help optimize the performance of their ML models.

data.title: Essential Utilities (NYSE: WTRG) declares $0.3426 per share dividend, payable on June 1, 2026. Dividend history: 80 years, increased 35 times in last 34 years.
data.description: In Bryn Mawr, Pennsylvania, Essential Utilities Inc. (NYSE: WTRG) announced that its board of directors approved a quarterly cash dividend of $0.3426 per share. This dividend will be payable on June 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 12, 2026. With a track record of 80 years, Essential Utilities has consistently provided quarterly cash dividends and has raised the dividend 35 times in the last 34 years. Essential Utilities, Inc. (NYSE: WTRG) is dedicated to providing safe, clean, and reliable services to enhance the quality of life for its customers.

data.title: Expert Devery Prince discusses unique Alaska auto insurance coverage in Anchorage, emphasizing risks and considerations.
data.description: Alaska, specifically Anchorage, stands out in the realm of auto insurance compared to the rest of the nation. A recent article by HelloNation delves into this disparity, shedding light on the distinct risks and coverage factors that set Alaskan drivers apart from others nationwide. This informative piece offers Anchorage residents a comprehensive understanding of the specific insurance landscape they navigate, highlighting key differences and considerations that come into play.

data.title: Speakeasy Dispensary to launch second Kentucky location in Nortonville at 140 N Hopkinsville St. - Feb 17, 2026 /PRNewswire
data.description: A second medical cannabis dispensary, Speakeasy Dispensary, has recently opened in Hopkins County, Kentucky. This new location at 140 N Hopkinsville St., Nortonville, KY 42442, will broaden patient access to medical cannabis in the area. The dispensary's opening on Feb. 17, 2026, marks a significant development in the state's medical cannabis landscape.

data.title: Michael Burry believes Palantir's moat is in obstructing data transfer, not in tech; cites NYPD issue. PLTR stock impacted.
data.description: Renowned investor Michael Burry recently criticized Palantir Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: PLTR) in a discussion surrounding the competitive advantage within the software industry. Burry argues that Palantir's strength does not lie in its advanced predictive modeling or Gotham interface, but rather in a unique form of vendor lock-in marked by data transfer obstacles. This issue was highlighted through a conflict between Palantir and the New York City Police Department, where the NYPD claimed Palantir refused to provide data in a transferable format after years of utilization, hindering access to valuable analytical insights generated within the system. Burry perceives this as an intentional business tactic by Palantir. Such controversies have impacted PLTR stock movement significantly. Visit Benzinga.com for the complete story.

data.title: MDWerks appoints Roy Milner to Board of Directors as Ted Kratovil steps down and retires, announced Feb. 17, 2026.
data.description: In Green Cove Springs, FL on Feb. 17, 2026, MDWerks, Inc. revealed the appointment of Roy Milner to its Board of Directors. The Company, known for its sustainable technology initiatives, made the announcement after Ted Kratovil retired, leading to his departure from the Board. MDWerks, trading under the ticker symbol MDWK on the OTCQB, continues to innovate under the guidance of its new Director.
